name: A.I. Pathfinding & Swag Route Finder
description: An interactive, visual pathfinding mod. Jump over spikes/blocks automatically, toggle orb click logic to discover alternate swag routes (like Polargeist's secret coin path), and watch the real-time AI vector line guide you.

pathfind-orbs.name: Register Rings/Orbs
pathfind-orbs.description: Turn off to ignore standard orb tracks and drop into hidden custom paths (e.g. Polargeist coin route).

pathfind-spikes.name: Evade Spikes
pathfind-spikes.description: Auto-jump when a standard ground hazard is detected near the icon.

pathfind-visuals.name: Show Vector Lines
pathfind-visuals.description: Draw path indicator segments dynamically on screen while playing.
